ns0:entry.ns0:title: Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
Language: go
CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go. It integrates 100+ security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, role-based testing with predefined security roles, a skills system with specialized testing skills, and comprehensive lifecycle management capabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API is an open-source relay platform that unifies Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, and Antigravity subscriptions into a single endpoint. It supports account sharing and cost-sharing, with seamless native tool compatibility.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bluenviron/mediamtx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bluenviron/mediamtx
Language: go
Ready-to-use Media-over-QUIC / SRT / WebRTC / RTSP / RTMP / LL-HLS / MPEG-TS / RTP live media server and media proxy that allows to read, publish, proxy, record and playback real-time video and audio streams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: docker/docker-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/docker/docker-agent
Language: go
AI Agent Builder and Runtime by Docker Engineering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ethereum/go-ethereum
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum
Language: go
Go implementation of the Ethereum protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gruntwork-io/terragrunt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gruntwork-io/terragrunt
Language: go
Terragrunt is a flexible orchestration tool that allows Infrastructure as Code written in OpenTofu/Terraform to scale.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform
Language: go
Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: juicedata/juicefs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/juicedata/juicefs
Language: go
JuiceFS is a distributed POSIX file system built on top of Redis and S3.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kenn-io/agentsview
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kenn-io/agentsview
Language: go
Local-first session search, analytics, insights, and token use statistics for coding agents, supporting Claude Code, Codex, and more than 20 other agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
Language: go
Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maximhq/bifrost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maximhq/bifrost
Language: go
Fastest enterprise AI gateway (50x faster than LiteLLM) with adaptive load balancer, cluster mode, guardrails, 1000+ models support & <100 µs overhead at 5k RPS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: navidrome/navidrome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/navidrome/navidrome
Language: go
🎧 Your Personal Streaming Service

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netbirdio/netbird
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netbirdio/netbird
Language: go
Connect your devices into a secure WireGuard®-based overlay network with SSO, MFA and granular access controls.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rclone/rclone
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rclone/rclone
Language: go
"rsync for cloud storage" - Google Drive, S3, Dropbox, Backblaze B2, One Drive, Swift, Hubic, Wasabi, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob, Azure Files, Yandex Files

ns0:entry.ns0:title: restic/restic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/restic/restic
Language: go
Fast, secure, efficient backup program

ns0:entry.ns0:title: runatlantis/atlantis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis
Language: go
Terraform Pull Request Automation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seaweedfs/seaweedfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seaweedfs/seaweedfs
Language: go
SeaweedFS is a distributed storage system for object storage (S3), file systems, and Iceberg tables, designed to handle billions of files with O(1) disk access and effortless horizontal scaling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: temporalio/temporal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/temporalio/temporal
Language: go
Temporal service

ns0:entry.ns0:title: traefik/traefik
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/traefik/traefik
Language: go
The Cloud Native Application Proxy

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tulir/whatsmeow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tulir/whatsmeow
Language: go
Go library for the WhatsApp web multidevice API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zitadel/zitadel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zitadel/zitadel
Language: go
ZITADEL - Identity infrastructure, simplified for you.
